text: Replication results Arias, Rubio-Ramírez, & Waggoner (2018). Replication results Antolín-Díaz Rubio-Ramírez (2018).
code: # investigate the effects of the optimism shock data(optimism)  # specify identifying restrictions: # + no effect on productivity (zero restriction) # + positive effect on stock prices (positive sign restriction) sign_irf       = matrix(c(0, 1, rep(NA, 23)), 5, 5)  # specify the model specification  = specify_bsvarSIGN$new(optimism * 100,                                        p        = 4,                                        sign_irf = sign_irf)  # estimate the model posterior      = estimate(specification, S = 100)  # compute and plot impulse responses irf            = compute_impulse_responses(posterior, horizon = 40) plot(irf, probability = 0.68) # investigate the effects of the contractionary monetary policy shock data(monetary)  # specify identifying restrictions: # + sign restrictions on the impulse responses at horizons from 0 to 5 sign_irf       = matrix(NA, 6, 6) sign_irf[, 1]  = c(NA, -1, -1, NA, -1, 1) sign_irf       = array(sign_irf, dim = c(6, 6, 6))  # + narrative sign restriction: the shock is positive in October 1979 sign_narrative = list(   specify_narrative(start = 166, periods = 1, type = "S", sign = 1, shock = 1),   specify_narrative(start = 166, periods = 1, type = "B", sign = 1, shock = 1, var = 6) )  # specify the model specification  = specify_bsvarSIGN$new(monetary       * 100,                                        p              = 12,                                        sign_irf       = sign_irf,                                        sign_narrative = sign_narrative)  # estimate the model posterior      = estimate(specification, S = 100)  # compute and plot impulse responses irf            = compute_impulse_responses(posterior, horizon = 60) plot(irf, probability = 0.68)

title: Bayesian Estimation of Structural Vector Autoregressions Identified by Sign, Zero, and Narrative Restrictions — bsvarSIGNs-package
text: Models. SVAR models package specified two equations, including reduced form equation: $$y_t = Ax_t + \epsilon_t$$ \(y_t\) N-vector dependent variables, \(x_t\) K-vector explanatory variables, \(\epsilon_t\) N-vector reduced form error terms, \(\) NxK matrix autoregressive slope coefficients parameters deterministic terms \(x_t\). structural equation given : $$B\epsilon_t = u_t$$ \(u_t\) N-vector structural shocks, \(B\) NxN matrix contemporaneous relationships. Finally, models share following assumptions regarding structural shocks u_t, namely, joint conditional normality given past observations collected matrix x_t, temporal contemporaneous independence. latter implies zero correlations autocorrelations. Identification. identification SVAR model achieved imposing: sign restrictions structural matrix \(B\), sign zero restrictions zero-horizon impulse responses \(\Theta_0 = B^{-1}\), sign restrictions impulse responses horizons \(\Theta_i\) \(= 1, 2, \ldots\), sign restrictions selected structural shocks \(u_t\), two types sign restrictions historical decompositions. restrictions determine sampling algorithms structural matrix \(B\) defined $$B = Q'L$$ \(Q\) NxN orthogonal matrix \(L\) lower-triangular matrix \(L = chol(\Sigma)^{-1}\), \(\Sigma\) NxN conditional covariance matrix reduced-form error term \(\epsilon_t\). Consult original papers Rubio-Ramírez, Waggoner & Zha (2010), Arias, Rubio-Ramírez, & Waggoner (2018) Antolín-Díaz Rubio-Ramírez (2018) details. Prior distributions. models feature hierarchical Minnesota prior following specification proposed Giannone, Lenza, Primiceri (2015) featuring: appropriate handling unit-root non-stationary variables   prior mean autoregressive coefficients \(\), normal prior shrinkage exhibiting exponential decay lag order   autoregressive matrices, sum--coefficients dummy-initial-observation prior, estimated shrinkage hyper-parameters, inverse-Wishart prior reduced-form covariance matrix \(\Sigma\), estimated diagonal elements inverse-Wishart prior scale matrix.

what: Bayesian estimation of a Structural Vector Autoregression with traditional and narrative sign restrictions via Gibbs sampler — estimate.BSVARSIGN
title: Bayesian estimation of a Structural Vector Autoregression with traditional and narrative sign restrictions via Gibbs sampler — estimate.BSVARSIGN
text: Estimates Bayesian Structural Vector Autoregression model using Gibbs sampler proposed Waggoner & Zha (2003) traditional sign restrictions following Rubio-Ramírez, Waggoner & Zha (2010) narrative sign restrictions following Antolín-Díaz & Rubio-Ramírez (2018). Additionally, parameter matrices \(\) \(B\) follow Minnesota prior generalised-normal prior distributions respectively matrix-specific overall shrinkage parameters estimated using hierarchical prior distribution. Given sign restrictions, Gibbs sampler iteration, sampler draws rotation matrix \(Q\) uniformly space NxN orthogonal matrices checks sign restrictions satisfied. valid \(Q\) found within max_tries (defined specify_bsvarSIGN), sampler saves current \(\) \(B\) draw proceeds next iteration. Otherwise, sampler proceeds next iteration without saving current \(\) \(B\) draw. narrative sign restriction given, posterior draws resampled algorithm 1 Antolín-Díaz & Rubio-Ramírez (2018). See section Details model equations.

title: Bayesian estimation of a Structural Vector Autoregression with traditional and narrative sign restrictions via Gibbs sampler — estimate.BSVARSIGN
text: object class PosteriorBSVARSIGN containing Bayesian estimation output containing two elements: posterior list collection S draws posterior distribution generated via Gibbs sampler containing: NxKxS array posterior draws matrix \(\) B NxNxS array posterior draws matrix \(B\) hyper 5xS matrix posterior draws hyper-parameters hierarchical prior distribution skipped integer total skipped iterations,  Gibbs sampler performs total S+skipped iterations,  sampler find valid rotation matrix Q within max_tries,  current iteration skipped (.e. current draw ,B saved).  message shown skipped/(skipped+S/thin) > 0.05, S/thin total number draws returned. last_draw object class BSVARSIGN last draw current MCMC run starting value passed continuation MCMC estimation using estimate().

title: Bayesian estimation of a Structural Vector Autoregression with traditional and narrative sign restrictions via Gibbs sampler — estimate.BSVARSIGN
text: Structural VAR model given reduced form equation: $$Y = AX + E$$ \(Y\) NxT matrix dependent variables, \(X\) KxT matrix explanatory variables, \(E\) NxT matrix reduced form error terms, \(\) NxK matrix autoregressive slope coefficients parameters deterministic terms \(X\). structural equation given $$= U$$ \(U\) NxT matrix structural form error terms, \(B\) NxN matrix contemporaneous relationships. specifically, $$B = Q'P$$ \(Q\) NxN rotation matrix \(P\) NxN lower triangular matrix. Finally, structural shocks, U, temporally contemporaneously independent jointly normally distributed zero mean unit variances.

text: p positive integer - number lags. hyper (N+3)xS matrix hyper-parameters \(\mu, \delta, \lambda, \psi\). NxK normal prior mean matrix autoregressive parameters. V KxK matrix determining  normal prior column-specific covariance autoregressive parameters. S NxN matrix determining inverted-Wishart prior scale error terms covariance matrix. nu positive scalar greater N+1 - shape inverted-Wishart prior error terms covariance matrix. data TxN matrix observations. Y NxT matrix dependent variables. X KxT matrix independent variables. Ysoc NxN matrix sum--coefficients dummy observations. Xsoc KxN matrix sum--coefficients dummy observations. Ysur NxN matrix single-unit-root dummy observations. Xsur KxN matrix single-unit-root dummy observations. mu.scale positive scalar - shape gamma prior \(\mu\). mu.shape positive scalar - shape gamma prior \(\mu\). delta.scale positive scalar - shape gamma prior \(\delta\). delta.shape positive scalar - shape gamma prior \(\delta\). lambda.scale positive scalar - shape gamma prior \(\lambda\). lambda.shape positive scalar - shape gamma prior \(\lambda\). psi.scale positive scalar - shape inverted gamma prior \(\psi\). psi.shape positive scalar - shape inverted gamma prior \(\psi\). covid NULL positive integer indicating start COVID-19 pandemic.
